description: run_payment_uvm_model calls cudaMemPrefetchAsync to migrate UVM pages to the device before kernel launch; the other two skip the prefetch (hot data is already device-resident). Unifying onto a shared runner that drops the prefetch produces a 50x runtime regression under page-fault thrashing.

findings.rationale: run_payment_uvm_model has an extra cudaMemPrefetchAsync call before the kernel launch; the other two go straight to launch. The prefetch's return value is discarded — its effect is on UVM page residency. Constructor-side-effect family (T029/T039/T061/T065/T068).
